title: Pumpkin Blur Blocker
description: Pumpkin Blur Blocker is a resource pack that removes the blur effect on your screen when you wear a pumpkin. This keeps your vision always clear and sharp, making your game experience more comfortable.
body:
Pumpkin Blur Blocker is a simple and useful resource pack that completely removes the distracting blur effect that appears on your screen when you wear a pumpkin.

In Minecraft, when you wear a pumpkin on your head, the game adds a blur effect that separates you from the world around you and limits your vision. This can be quite annoying, especially when fighting monsters. This pack solves that exact problem.

With Pumpkin Blur Blocker, your vision remains completely open and clear when you wear a pumpkin. Now you can move more comfortably when exploring at night or just walking around with a pumpkin mask on.

Installation is very simple. Just place the downloaded .zip file into your resourcepacks folder, which you can access from the Minecraft main menu by going to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder. Once you enable the pack, you will see the changes instantly.

I hope Pumpkin Blur Blocker makes your Minecraft adventure more enjoyable!
